# UX Checklist: Product-Line Switcher and activeWorkspace Scoping

**Purpose**: Validate header terminology, responsive switcher layout, listbox accessibility, localization, panel taxonomy, and non-happy-state UX requirements before task generation
**Created**: 2026-04-26
**Feature**: [Link to spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Is the new header and switcher UI required to use Facility and Product Line terminology instead of labeling tenant context as "Workspace"? [Completeness, Spec FR-020]
- [x] CHK002 Is the Product Line switcher required to appear only when `FEATURE_WORKSPACE_SWITCHER` resolves enabled from authenticated tenant/facility `/api/workspaces` context? [Completeness, Spec FR-002]
- [x] CHK003 Are Facility and selected Product Line visual states defined as distinct without relying on explanatory header or chrome copy? [Resolved, Spec FR-020, FR-022, SC-015]
- [x] CHK004 Are desktop and mobile placement requirements specified for the left header context cluster and compact mobile trigger? [Completeness, Spec FR-021]

## Responsive Header Requirements

- [x] CHK005 Are 320 px, 375 px, and 390 px viewport requirements explicitly stated for the compact trigger? [Measurability, Spec FR-021]
- [x] CHK006 Are `min-w-0`, bounded max widths, and text truncation specified so long names cannot displace search, notifications, language, theme, or account controls? [Clarity, Spec FR-021]
- [x] CHK007 Is long-name behavior covered by acceptance criteria or edge cases rather than implied by styling preferences? [Coverage, Spec Edge Cases, SC-012]

## Listbox Accessibility and Interaction

- [x] CHK008 Are selectable rows limited to Facility/Product Line `option` rows while loading, empty, and error content remains non-focusable status/alert content outside the selectable option set? [Completeness, Spec FR-023]
- [x] CHK009 Are selected-state, `aria-selected`, roving focus or `aria-activedescendant`, Arrow/Home/End navigation, Enter/Space selection, Escape/outside-click close, and trigger focus-return requirements specified for the popover? [Resolved, Spec FR-023, SC-011]
- [x] CHK010 Is duplicate Facility prevention specified for both switcher rendering and real `facility` workspace rejection? [Completeness, Spec FR-004, FR-011]
- [x] CHK011 Are loading, empty, and error state semantics measurable through status/alert roles and non-focusable placement? [Measurability, Spec FR-023, SC-011]

## Localization and Copy

- [x] CHK012 Are header and switcher strings required to follow existing `messages/*.json` localization patterns? [Completeness, Spec FR-024]
- [x] CHK013 Are Facility, Product Line, loading, empty, error, and aria-label strings included in the localization requirement? [Completeness, Spec FR-024]

## Scenario and Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK014 Are workspace-list failure and unauthorized Product Line selection states specified distinctly from generic switcher error content? [Resolved, Spec Edge Cases, FR-002, FR-023, SC-011]
- [x] CHK015 Are Facility-only, Product Line access, unauthorized workspace, malformed persisted payload, and real `facility` workspace edge cases addressed in requirements? [Coverage, Spec Edge Cases, FR-007, FR-011]
- [x] CHK016 Are mode-sensitive, Facility aggregate, and Facility/global surfaces mapped to an explicit panel taxonomy that implementation tasks can apply consistently? [Resolved, Spec Panel Taxonomy, FR-010, FR-012, FR-017, SC-015]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK017 Can header terminology and flag-gated switcher behavior be traced to measurable success criteria or workflow acceptance criteria? [Traceability, Spec SC-010, Workflow P1-AC8]
- [x] CHK018 Can responsive and accessibility behavior be traced to measurable Playwright flag-ON coverage requirements? [Traceability, Spec SC-011, SC-012]
- [x] CHK019 Do the generated artifacts trace Facility/Product Line visual distinction, full keyboard/focus behavior, workspace-list failure handling, and panel taxonomy to acceptance evidence without relying on the roadmap text alone? [Resolved, Spec FR-022, FR-023, SC-011, SC-015; Quickstart UX and Accessibility Check; Contract UI and Panel Taxonomy]
